API used to confirm if forgot password token is valid

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}

  parameters={undefined}

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"description":"EmailUser object for which token has to validate","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"userId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"username":{"type":"string"},"emailId":{"type":"string"},"token":{"type":"string"},"password":{"type":"string"},"hashPassword":{"type":"string"}},"title":"EmailUser"}}},"required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
